title: Demo Day Brunch Notes
text: A week later the same crowd regrouped in SoMa for a demo day brunch hosted by Lattice Forge. Ada Vector was back, Milo Kern was still working the room, and everyone was talking about Nimbus Capital's new climate thesis. Between espresso refills, founders compared office space in Mission Bay, argued about whether Redwood Foundry was an AI lab or a branding exercise, and agreed that Palo Alto dinners were somehow becoming the real distribution channel.
